nodes.title: Ticker uses input
nodes.summary: The ticker field is built with an HTML <input>, which inherently limits content to a single line.

nodes.title: No spaces allowed
nodes.summary: Because of the <input> element and trimming logic, users cannot type spaces or newlines in the ticker.

nodes.title: Auto‑uppercase on change
nodes.summary: Every keystroke is transformed to uppercase via e.target.value.toUpperCase(), which is unnecessary for multiline text.

nodes.title: Keydown stops propagation
nodes.summary: The onKeyDown handler calls e.stopPropagation() but does not affect the single‑line restriction.

nodes.title: Global shortcuts conflict
nodes.summary: Page‑level Ctrl+S, Ctrl+N, Escape handlers may capture keystrokes intended for the ticker field.

nodes.title: Trim removes spaces
nodes.summary: updateCurrentNote applies .trim() to the ticker, stripping intentional leading or trailing spaces.

nodes.title: CSV assumes single line
nodes.summary: Export and import functions treat ticker as a single line and do not quote it, breaking multiline values.

nodes.title: CSS targets input
nodes.summary: The .editor-ticker-input style is written for an <input>, not a <textarea>, preventing proper display of multiline content.

nodes.title: NoteCard single line display
nodes.summary: NotesPanel.tsx renders ticker in a single‑line element, which must be updated to support line breaks.

nodes.title: Supabase stores raw ticker
nodes.summary: Backend storage accepts the ticker as‑is, so no server‑side constraints exist.

nodes.title: Replace input with textarea
nodes.summary: Switching to <textarea> enables multiline entry and, with rows=1 plus auto‑grow, retains a compact UI.

nodes.title: Remove uppercase conversion
nodes.summary: Eliminating the automatic .toUpperCase() preserves the original casing, which is appropriate for multiline tickers.

nodes.title: Keep spaces in updates
nodes.summary: Deleting .trim() from updateCurrentNote allows intentional spaces to remain in the ticker value.

nodes.title: Quote multiline ticker in CSV
nodes.summary: Export and import routines must wrap ticker fields in quotes to safely handle embedded newlines.

nodes.title: Break circular dependencies
nodes.summary: Removing the input‑based, uppercase‑, and trim‑enforced assumptions eliminates the feedback loop that blocked multiline tickers.
